results.name: larva
results.description: The active immature form of an insect, especially one that differs greatly from the adult and forms the stage between egg and pupa, e.g. a caterpillar or grub.

results.name: last chance
results.description: Red cards that manipulate the turn cycle, then kill you.

results.name: latin text
results.description: Latin appearing in card art

results.name: lattice
results.description: The biological latticework pattern which is seen in Eldrazi of Emrakul's brood, and which appeared all over Innistrad to herald Emrakul's arrival.

results.name: lava
results.description: Or magma.

results.name: lavabrink
results.description: A sanctuary in Raugrin, on Ikoria.

results.name: lavafall
results.description: A waterfall, but with Lava

results.name: lazotep
results.description: A blue, magical material found on Amonkhet, which interacts with necromancy in various ways.

results.name: leaf hair
results.description: It's the new fashion, you hear?

results.name: leaves battlefield trigger
results.description: Cards that trigger on something leaving the battlefield.

results.name: leaves graveyard trigger
results.description: Cards that have triggers whenever a card (or cards) leave your graveyard

results.name: lectern
results.description: A reading stand with just enough space for a book.

results.name: left-facing
results.description: Depicts a creature that is illustrated facing left (see Sly Spy)

results.name: left-handed
results.description: People apparently using their left hand as their dominant hand. This may include using their left hand for their topmost or only grip on their primary weapon.

results.name: legacy
results.description: One or more of the artifacts that Urza assembled to create the Legacy Weapon to defeat Yawgmoth.

results.name: legacy
results.description: Effects that involve physical alteration or selection of the card itself before or during the game, usually with the implication of a permanent change of some sorts. Named after Legacy board games with this similar gimmick.

results.name: legendary team-up
results.description: March of the Machines introduced a number of cards representing legendary cards teaming up. (And some playtest cards expanded on the concept.)

results.name: legendfall
results.description: Cards that care about legendaries entering the battlefield.

results.name: legends retold
results.description: A series of Set Booster-exclusives released in Dominaria United, all of which are reworks of some of the original legendary creatures from Legends.

results.name: legion of dusk
results.description: The Vampire faction of Ixalan

results.name: legion of dusk rose
results.description: A rose, the symbol of the Legion of Dusk.

results.name: legs crossed
results.description: Sitting (or leaning) with one leg crossed over the other. Not to be confused with [cross-legged](cross-legged).

results.name: lembas
results.description: An elvish food for consuming while travelling long distances in Lord of the Rings

results.name: lemur
results.description: A type of monkey. Not to be confused with [lemure](https://tagger.scryfall.com/tags/artwork/lemure).

results.name: leonin
results.description: Lion people, as they are depicted through Magic.
